title: The Lady in Ermine
writer: Ernst Welisch, Rudolph Schanzer, Benjamin Glazer
actors: Corinne Griffith, Einar Hanson, Ward Crane
plot: A newly-married couple, scions of local nobility, are living in a castle. There is a huge portrait of "The Lady in Ermine" hanging on a wall. The legend of the painting tells of the Countess' grandmother who gave her honor that th...
